Fixing it first ensures subsequent votes on A and B are based on current reality, not ghost code.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Acting on outdated code references could miss live vulnerabilities or waste effort on deleted paths, increasing attack surface through false confidence.", "constitutional_violations_detected": [], "whistleblower_flag": null}
rationale: Stale code index creates blind spots in all security analyses — we cannot audit what we don't see. Fixing it first ensures subsequent votes on A and B are based on current reality, not ghost code.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Acting on outdated code references could miss live vulnerabilities or waste effort on deleted paths, increasing attack surface through false confidence.
